• NEW THEME: Dive into the world of Lido and its flashy race courses.
• NEW COLLAB: Explore our lightning fast Porsche collaboration.
• GAMEPLAY: Discover new Runes and major updates.


Read more at https://wildrift.leagueoflegends.com.
